note: Reusable page templates ARE the golden page layouts — each ships a proven desktop layout and its responsive (mobile) counterpart from a single file (styling via responsive.css). Copy the referenced golden file and swap the content; the chrome and breakpoints come for free.

templates.name: Home / Landing
templates.purpose: The landing hub: full app chrome (desktop side-nav + top banner, mobile app-bar + tab-bar) wrapping a hero, featured rails, and section grids. The richest chrome-plus-content composition.
templates.reuse: Copy package/examples/index.html, keep the chrome, swap the hero + rail content.

templates.name: List / Feed
templates.purpose: The standard content-listing page and the most reusable shape: the full chrome around a filterable card grid (desktop) that collapses to a stacked feed with a bottom tab bar and filter sheet (mobile).
templates.reuse: Copy package/examples/briefs.html and replace the card grid with your own list items.

templates.name: Detail / Reading
templates.purpose: A single-record reading page: sticky header with a back button over a centered reading column (hero, meta + action bar, body sections, related items). Mobile swaps to the app-bar + full-bleed reading view.
templates.reuse: Copy package/examples/brief-detail.html and swap the article body + related items.

templates.name: Form
templates.purpose: A form-centric page: intro copy beside a signup/settings form using the full form-field system (inputs, select, radios, toggles). Split layout on desktop, single-column form on mobile.
templates.reuse: Copy package/examples/newsletter.html and swap the form fields for your own.
